tasks.subject: Task 0: Project Scaffolding + Shared Schemas
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Set up Python project with all dependencies, directory structure, shared Pydantic models, and config system.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/pyproject.toml, backend/core/config.py, backend/models/*.py
- Test: tests/backend/test_models.py

**Verify:** `cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/backend/test_models.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/pyproject.toml", "sunshift/backend/core/config.py", "sunshift/backend/models/agent.py", "sunshift/backend/models/prediction.py", "sunshift/backend/models/metrics.py", "sunshift/backend/models/commands.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/backend/test_models.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["uv sync installs all dependencies", "Pydantic models validate and reject correctly", "Config loads from env vars", "All model tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Data Collection Clients
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build EIA + OpenWeatherMap API clients with Pydantic validation and fallback handling.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/backend/ml/data_collector.py
- Test: sunshift/tests/backend/test_data_collector.py

**Verify:** `cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/backend/test_data_collector.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/backend/ml/data_collector.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/backend/test_data_collector.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EIA client fetches hourly demand data", "Weather client fetches forecast", "Null data falls back to last known", "Stale data flags low confidence"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Feature Engineering Pipeline
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Transform raw data into ML-ready features with cyclical encoding, lag features, interaction terms.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/backend/ml/features.py
- Test: sunshift/tests/backend/test_features.py

**Verify:** `cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/backend/test_features.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/backend/ml/features.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/backend/test_features.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All 7 spec features produced", "Cyclical encoding correct", "No NaN in output", "Returns pandas DataFrame"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: ML Model Training (Prophet + XGBoost)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Train Prophet baseline + XGBoost ensemble, evaluate, serialize models.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/backend/ml/model.py, sunshift/scripts/train_model.py
- Test: sunshift/tests/backend/test_model.py

**Verify:** `cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/backend/test_model.py -v --timeout=120`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/backend/ml/model.py", "sunshift/scripts/train_model.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/backend/test_model.py -v --timeout=120", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Prophet trains and forecasts 48h", "XGBoost trains on full features", "Models serialize/deserialize", "MAPE evaluated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Prediction Service + Optimal Window Scheduler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prediction service with caching, circuit breaker fallback, optimal cost window finder.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/backend/ml/predict.py, sunshift/backend/ml/scheduler.py
- Test: sunshift/tests/backend/test_predict.py

**Verify:** `cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/backend/test_predict.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/backend/ml/predict.py", "sunshift/backend/ml/scheduler.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/backend/test_predict.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Caches predictions for 1 hour", "Falls back to static TOU on failure", "Finds cheapest consecutive windows", "Returns PredictionResponse schema"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: FastAPI Backend — Routes + WebSocket
tasks.description:
**Goal:** FastAPI app with all SP1 routes and WebSocket handler.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/backend/main.py, backend/api/routes/*.py, backend/api/websocket.py
- Test: sunshift/tests/backend/test_routes.py

**Verify:** `cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/backend/test_routes.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/backend/main.py", "sunshift/backend/api/routes/agents.py", "sunshift/backend/api/routes/predictions.py", "sunshift/backend/api/routes/metrics.py", "sunshift/backend/api/routes/commands.py", "sunshift/backend/api/websocket.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/backend/test_routes.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST agents/register creates agent", "POST metrics/ingest accepts metrics", "GET predictions/energy returns 48h forecast", "WebSocket sends commands and receives heartbeats"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: On-Prem Agent — Collector + Config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Agent config loader, SQLite buffer, system metrics collector.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/agent/config.py, agent/db.py, agent/collector.py
- Test: sunshift/tests/agent/test_collector.py

**Verify:** `cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/agent/test_collector.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/agent/config.py", "sunshift/agent/db.py", "sunshift/agent/collector.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/agent/test_collector.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Config loads from YAML", "SQLite stores metrics with retention", "Collector reads CPU/RAM/Disk/Network"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: On-Prem Agent — Command Receiver + Main
tasks.description:
**Goal:** WebSocket client with reconnect, heartbeat, command dispatch, agent main entry.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/agent/command_receiver.py, agent/main.py
- Test: sunshift/tests/agent/test_command_receiver.py

**Verify:** `cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/agent/test_command_receiver.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/agent/command_receiver.py", "sunshift/agent/main.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift && uv run pytest tests/agent/test_command_receiver.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WebSocket connects and sends heartbeat", "Commands dispatched to handlers", "Exponential backoff on disconnect", "Agent main orchestrates collector + receiver"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Docker + Integration Verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Docker setup + verify full stack: backend serves predictions, agent connects.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/Dockerfile, sunshift/docker-compose.yml

**Verify:** `cd sunshift && docker compose up -d && sleep 3 && curl http://localhost:8000/health`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/Dockerfile", "sunshift/docker-compose.yml"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift && docker compose up -d && sleep 3 && curl http://localhost:8000/health", "acceptanceCriteria": ["docker compose up starts backend", "health endpoint returns ok", "predictions endpoint returns 48h forecast", "Full test suite passes with >80% coverage"]}
```
